lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or paint issues. The interior is in factory condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible wear from regular use, including some fading on the seats. The car is functional and operational, though it shows clear signs of age.

Looking for a rewarding project or a super affordable way to get around? This car has seen a lot of miles and definitely shows its history, but it’s a fantastic opportunity for a mechanic or someone handy! It needs some significant TLC and repairs to get back to its best, but it offers a great foundation at a price that won't break the bank!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for anyone looking for functional transportation. Mechanically, the engine starts up without issue and the transmission shifts through all gears, though it does exhibit the typical vibrations and road noise associated with its age and mileage. The exterior shows clear signs of use, including several noticeable door dings, a minor scuff on the front bumper, and some thinning of the clear coat on the roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear on the driver's seat bolster and some light staining on the carpets. While the air conditioning and heater work well, the infotainment screen has a few dead pixels. It is a solid, honest car that has plenty of life left but is priced to reflect its cosmetic imperfections and high-mileage status.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it does show signs of its age and mileage. Mechanically, the engine starts reliably and runs well, although there is a minor oil seep near the valve cover and the suspension feels a bit soft over bumps. The exterior displays several visible cosmetic imperfections, including noticeable scratches on the bumpers and a small shopping cart dent on the driver's side door. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows moderate wear on the driver's seat bolster, and the infotainment screen has a few dead pixels. While it is fully functional and safe to drive, it would benefit from some cosmetic detailing and a standard tune-up to bring it back to its best state.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle offers a sophisticated blend of engineering excellence and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, it stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and reliable performance. This represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a refined automotive experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m looking to pass along my reliable ride to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. It’s been such a solid car for me—starts right up every time and has been really well-cared for over the years. It’s got plenty of life left in it and is ready for its next adventure! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it or take it for a test drive. Can't wait to hear from you!

This E46 M3 is a purist's specimen, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission shifts with precision, channeling power through a variable M differential lock for exceptional corner
Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

This well-maintained vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable and attractive car without the new-car price tag. The exterior paint retains a beautiful shine, with only minor cosmetic wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the interior is exceptionally clean and spacious; the seats are supportive and free of major blemishes, while the dashboard and controls show very little wear. Every feature, from the climate control to the infotainment system, is in full working order. Under the hood, the car has been serviced regularly, resulting in a smooth, responsive engine and a quiet ride. The brakes feel firm, and the tires have significant life remaining. This is a smoke-free, honest vehicle that has been treated with respect and is ready for many more miles of dependable service. It strikes the perfect balance of performance, comfort, and value.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a superior standard of care and consistent mechanical reliability. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our stringent operational benchmarks, offering a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value. A premier opportunity for the astute buyer who prioritizes both performance and pedigree.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, the mechanical systems operate with precision, while the interior and exterior remain in commendable condition. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a great car to own. It's in really nice shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable daily driver without the brand-new price tag. It runs smoothly and looks great—you're going to love it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, featuring a 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. Power is delivered through a 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a M-variable limited-slip differential. This specimen features Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The chassis remains taut with precise steering rack feedback and minimal bushing compliance, ensuring the subframe and suspension geometry perform as intended. Recent fluid analysis confirms the integrity of the powertrain, making this a turn-key enthusiast machine for those seeking a visceral, analog driving dynamic.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable runner. Recent service completed.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor road-wear consistent with careful use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal creasing, fully functional dual-zone climate control, and an intuitive infotainment system. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with recent professional inspections confirming the engine and transmission are smooth and responsive. It sits on a set of premium tires with substantial tread remaining and comes complete with two sets of keys and a comprehensive history of service records. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for the open road.

This distinguished vehicle offers a superlative balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showcasing consistent mechanical integrity, it provides a refined driving experience indicative of its well-preserved status. Our rigorous assessment confirms its readiness for immediate service, ensuring peace of mind for the next owner. A premier choice for those who demand reliability without compromising on sophistication.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. An exceptional choice for those who value both prestige and proven durability.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s looking for a new home! It’s been so reliable and is in really wonderful shape—super clean inside and out. It drives like a dream and has been well-loved and maintained. Perfect for your next adventure! Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded poly bushings. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. Power is transmitted via a precise Getrag manual gearbox to the M-variable differential lock. Suspension is sorted with Bilstein B16 coilovers, providing excellent damping control without compromising daily drivability. A high-revving, mechanically sound driver’s car ready for its next spirited stint.
Solid daily driver. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean title. Minor wear only.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive form, both mechanically and aesthetically. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent service history, while the transmission shifts seamlessly. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor signs of careful road use, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. Inside, the cabin feels premium; the upholstery is clean and free of tears, and all electronic features—from the infotainment system to the climate control—function perfectly. It provides a quiet, confident ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. Ready for its next chapter, this car offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance.

Presented in commendable condition, this vehicle exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and aesthetic upkeep. It has been subject to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring mechanical reliability and a sophisticated driving profile. For the professional seeking a dependable yet distinguished automotive solution, this remains a standout acquisition that delivers sustained value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the unit displays consistent performance metrics and a well-preserved interior cabin. It serves as an exemplary choice for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber automotive investment that maintains a commanding presence on the road.

It runs super smoothly and is honestly just ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Come take it for a spin—I think you're really going to love how it handles!
